title: geraniospermum cordifolium
intro: Geraniospermum cordifolium, a plant species native to Southeast Asia, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Menispermaceae, also known as moonseed. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Geraniospermum cordifolium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
